      "question": "What is a distributed transaction in a distributed system?",
      "options": ["A) A single transaction that spans multiple nodes", "B) A single node that processes multiple transactions", "C) A transaction that can be broken into multiple sub-transactions across multiple nodes", "D) A transaction that can only be committed or rolled back as a whole"],
      "correct": 2,
      "explanation": "A distributed transaction is a transaction that involves mu
